metadata.description: Batch 42 — additional Oxford 5000 words 1101-1200; source-aligned from attached PDF

words.definitionEn: the great size, importance, or force of something
words.definitionTh: ขนาด / ความรุนแรง
words.example: Quantify the magnitude of the deviation.

words.definitionEn: the main continuous part of a country or continent
words.definitionTh: แผ่นดินใหญ่

words.definitionEn: ideas or activities accepted by most people

words.definitionEn: work done to keep equipment in good condition

words.definitionTh: การแต่งหน้า / ส่วนประกอบ

words.definitionEn: to show a quality or become clear
